new_claims.claim_text: Germany and France are preparing for compulsory military service, banning fighting-age men from leaving.
new_claims.notes: Significant claim regarding European conscription, requires verification.

new_claims.claim_text: Trump stated South Korea, Australia, and Japan did not help the US despite US military presence.
new_claims.notes: Quote from Trump regarding international alliances, needs verification of exact wording and context.

new_claims.claim_text: Artemis II moon photos are fake or misattributed; some are from a 2021 astrophotographer Prathamesh Jaju.
new_claims.notes: Claims of misattribution used to sow doubt about official space missions.

new_claims.claim_text: Netanyahu and his wife have been officially declared dead.
A Dubai plane carrying Israeli soldiers crashed near Tel Aviv due to an Iranian hypersonic missile.
Trump threatened to decimate every bridge and power plant in Iran by tomorrow night.
new_claims.notes: Significant geopolitical statement attributed to Trump.
